title: Magical Smoky French Yogurt Tarte Tatin
description: A keto-friendly, smoky twist on the classic French dessert, featuring yogurt and caramelized apples, perfect for a date-night dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, combine the melted butter, smoked sea salt, and vanilla extract, and cook over medium heat until the butter starts to brown.
Add the apples to the skillet and cook for 10 minutes, or until they are caramelized and tender.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt, granulated sweetener, and eggs until smooth.
Roll out the almond flour to a thickness of about 1/8 inch, and place it into a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Arrange the cooked apples in a concentric circle pattern on top of the almond flour crust.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the apples, making sure to cover them evenly.
Bake the tarte tatin for 35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove the tarte tatin from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Run a knife around the edges of the tarte tatin to release it from the pan, and invert it onto a serving plate.
